calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd
Off Calendar Aug-05-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lisa Sarto.
Hien Duc Doan , Esq. for Plaintiff: Bishara Kubein, also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant Pasticci, Inc. as follows:
Damages of $58,757.35
Attorney's fees $2,000.00
Costs of $512.25
For the total of $61,269.60
Judgment signed in open court.
